genesis_hash_note: Genesis sentinel changed from 'genesis' literal to '0'*64 on 2026-04-20 per cross-SDK fingerprint reconciliation (kailash-rs#449). Breaking change — chains rooted at the prior sentinel will not verify. Canonical across all Kailash SDKs per EATP D6.
metadata_canonicalisation: Compact JSON separators (',', ':'), sort_keys=True, ensure_ascii=True, typed scalars via kailash.trust._canonical.canonical_scalars (NO default=str). Timestamp rendered isoformat(timespec='microseconds') — six fractional digits (2026-06-20 canonical-conformance fix, issues #1400/#1405). Matches Rust serde_json::to_string(&BTreeMap) byte-for-byte.
